betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6View Cell & Creative Cell§f:
The View Cell (appliedenergistics2:view_cell) is a §especial-purpose storage cell§f that lets you see what's in a cell without actually removing it. It is used for inventory inspection and previewing.

§6Crafting Recipe (network/cells/view_cell.json)§f:
The View Cell is crafted with:
- 1× ME Storage Housing (appliedenergistics2:material:36) at center
- 1× Charged Certus Quartz Crystal (or Pure Certus Quartz Crystal)
- 1× Redstone (vanilla)
- 1× Quartz Glass (appliedenergistics2:quartz_glass)
- 4× Iron Ingot (vanilla, in corners)
- Yields 1× View Cell

§6Function§f:
The View Cell is inserted into an ME Drive like a normal storage cell. It:
- §bDisplays the contents of an adjacent cell§f in the same drive
- §bDoes not consume space§f in the cell being viewed
- §bProvides read-only access§f: items can be seen but not extracted
- §bWorks in the ME Chest§f: the chest's GUI shows the view cell's contents

§6Direct Descendants of View Cell (TaskRetrieval)§f:
The graph shows the View Cell as the task retrieval. It is a §especial-purpose tool§f, not a direct component of other recipes.

§6Creative Cell (appliedenergistics2:creative_storage_cell)§f:
The Creative Storage Cell is a §bcreative-mode-only§f storage cell that:
- Stores infinite item types
- Stores infinite item counts per type
- Can generate any item on demand
- Is not obtainable in survival gameplay
- Useful for testing and creative builds

§6Crafting Ingredients (TaskRetrieval)§f:
The graph shows 5 ingredient items in the View Cell recipe:
- Quartz Glass (AE2)
- Redstone (vanilla)
- Charged Certus Quartz Crystal (AE2) (or Pure Certus Quartz Crystal)
- Iron Ingot (vanilla)
- ME Storage Housing (AE2)

§6Why View Cells Matter§f:
View Cells are useful for:
- §bQuick inventory checks§f: see what's in a cell without opening the drive GUI
- §bCell capacity planning§f: monitor fill levels from a distance
- §bDebugging§f: identify which cell holds a specific item
- §bCell sorting verification§f: confirm that priority sorting is working

§6Creative Cell Use Cases§f:
- §bTesting networks§f: verify capacity calculations
- §bCreative builds§f: instant item access
- §bShowcase networks§f: demonstrate large-scale ME setups

§6Prerequisites§f:
Requires q30163 (Storage Components) — the View Cell is built using the same component infrastructure.

§eTip§f: Place a View Cell next to your main storage cell in the ME Drive. The cell GUI will show both sets of contents at once.

§eTip§f: For complex networks, use multiple View Cells in different drives. This lets you check the contents of all your storage from a central location.

§cWarning§f: The View Cell is read-only. You cannot extract items from a View Cell — it only displays the contents of the cell next to it.
